overall.description: A cinematic game engine video showing first-person exploration of Ollivanders wand shop from the Harry Potter universe. The player examines the detailed wooden interior filled with wand boxes, observes the wandmaker working at his desk, and exits to a medieval village street at night.

scene_state.functional_zone: wand shop main floor with display counter and shelves

agents.ego_description: slowly walking through the wand shop, examining the wooden counter and shelves filled with wand boxes

entered.detail: dark wooden shop counter with curved front and brass fittings
ornate brass lamp with glowing glass shade illuminating the counter
floor-to-ceiling wooden shelves packed with uniform rectangular wand boxes
small wooden stool beside the counter
decorative rug on the wooden floor in front of the counter
tall wooden ladder leaning against the back shelves

segments.scene_description: The segment opens inside a cozy, dimly lit wand shop with warm golden lighting from a brass lamp on the wooden counter. The camera slowly explores the main floor, showing shelves packed with wand boxes extending into the background, a patterned rug on the floor, and a wooden ladder leaning against the back wall.

scene_state.functional_zone: upper balcony level and side storage area with birdcages

events.description: camera tilts upward to reveal the second floor wooden balcony with railing
focus shifts to decorative empty birdcages and a towering stack of boxes

agents.ego_description: looking up at the balcony level and examining the side shelves with stacked inventory and decorative birdcages

entered.detail: wooden railing of the second floor balcony overlooking the shop
precariously tall vertical stack of wand boxes reaching toward the ceiling
hanging lamp illuminating the upper area
decorative wire birdcages sitting on a shelf
antique wooden dresser with multiple drawers
small window with wooden frame showing blue exterior light

segments.scene_description: The camera tilts upward to reveal a wooden balcony on the second floor, then pans to show a towering stack of wand boxes and decorative empty birdcages on the side shelves. The warm lamplight highlights the cluttered, cozy atmosphere of the storage area.

scene_state.functional_zone: back work area with wandmaker's desk and portrait gallery

events.description: elderly wandmaker in brown coat comes into view working at his desk
camera pans toward the shop door with glass panels at the front

agents.ego_description: watching the wandmaker examine a wand and studying the portrait gallery on the walls

notable_agents.action: elderly wandmaker in brown coat examining a wand at his work table

entered.detail: cluttered wooden desk with papers and wand-making tools
wall covered with framed portraits and pictures in wooden frames
tall standing lamp with white shade next to the work area
small window with drawn curtains showing blue night light
heavy wooden door with multiple glass panes and brass handle
small wooden table with a metal box and candle on it
antique brass balance scales sitting on the table

segments.scene_description: The camera moves to the back of the shop where an elderly wandmaker works at his cluttered desk beneath a tall floor lamp. The walls are decorated with framed portraits, and the camera slowly pans toward the front door, passing shelves of wand boxes and a small table with brass scales.

scene_state.functional_zone: medieval village street with timber-framed shop front

events.description: opening the shop door and stepping out into the cobblestone street
transition from warm interior lighting to cool blue hour exterior with street lamps

agents.ego_description: opening the shop door and stepping outside into the village street, then approaching the building from the cobblestone road

entered.detail: wet cobblestone road reflecting the street lamps
exterior of the timber-framed shop with steep roof and overhanging upper floor
lit street lamp on a post illuminating the cobblestones
dark silhouette of tall trees against the night sky
dark blue night sky visible above the buildings
triangular pennant flags hanging above the shop entrance

segments.scene_description: The camera opens the heavy wooden door and steps out into a medieval village street at night. The warm interior gives way to a cool, misty exterior with cobblestone streets, timber-framed buildings, and glowing street lamps. The camera approaches the shop front from outside, showing the building's steep roof and decorative bunting above the door.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a cozy, dimly lit wand shop that expands from the main floor up toward the cluttered storage of the upper level. It begins by exploring the main floor, where warm golden light from a brass lamp illuminates a wooden counter, a patterned rug, and shelves packed with wand boxes that stretch into the background. As the camera moves past a wooden ladder leaning against the back wall, the perspective tilts upward to reveal a wooden balcony on the second floor. The scene then pans across the elevated space, shifting focus toward a towering stack of wand boxes and decorative empty birdcages on the side shelves. Finally, the warm lamplight lingers on these high-reaching details, emphasizing the dense and cluttered atmosphere of the shop's storage area.

The shot follows a continuous camera movement from the cluttered, warm interior of a wand shop out into a cool, misty medieval village street at night. It begins at the back of the shop, gliding past an elderly wandmaker at his desk beneath a tall lamp and moving toward the front door past framed portraits and shelves of wand boxes. As the camera passes a small table with brass scales, it pushes through the heavy wooden door, causing the warm indoor lighting to give way to a dim, atmospheric exterior. The scene then expands to reveal a cobblestone street lined with timber-framed buildings and glowing lamps before the camera pivots to face the shop front. Finally, the view tilts upward to show the building's steep roof and decorative bunting hanging above the entrance.
